title: The Sham
body:
‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎‎ ![Bedlam](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b219c612d07ec010a3c02216b0f921b5855859d1.png)
‎‎ ### **About The Sham** The Sham is a mod that adds the Bedlam, a living nightmare disguised as a bed... **Beds are no longer safe**
Spoiler (at least at full moons and new moons)
Whenever you go to sleep during a full moon or a new moon, there is a chance that Bedlam will appear. This isn't just jumpscare, this creature is fast, brutal, and specifically designed to punish careless sleeping. **With this mod installed, nighttime becomes a real decision:** Sleep in a bed and risk facing a deadly enemy. Or stay awake, fighting weaker but numerous enemies until dawn. ### **Compatibility** **Dye Depot** - All colors of beds and everything that should work with it works! Be aware that this mod uses mixins, this may contain incompatibilities with other mods. **Nycto Team's discord server:** [https://discord.gg/YpxAffGBEW](https://discord.gg/YpxAffGBEW) ### **Mechanics:**
Spoiler - Spawns when player sleeps on bed during Full Moon or New Moon with a 50% chance. - When spawning, stands up with the player on top and throws the player forward if there is no block above it. - Changes vanilla bed behavior, players cannot sleep if there is any block above the bed. - Takes increased damage from axes and fire. - Crouches when there is no empty space above its head. - Can break wooden doors. - Does not drown in water. - Afraid of fire. - Cannot ride minecarts or boats. - Immune to all status effects. - Disappears during daytime or when the player dies. - After Bedlam dies or disappears, the player’s bed is restored to its original state.
![The Sham](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c8e345e091a095799bd5f634cdaa4ae0145aee9.png) ### **FAQ** **Any backports? Fabric support?** - This mod is being developed for 1.20.1 Forge. Ports and other loaders support are NOT planned. **Can I use The Sham in a modpack or other content?** - Yeah! Just don't forget to properly credit us. **Can I use The Sham's textures, or other assets?** - Only in certain cases, you should ask us (discord server above) ### **Credits** - __ray_s, rofoo_ - Textures - __ray_s_ - Models - _HandLock__ - Sounds - _Ysach, Nerpa4ch_ - Animations - _Monkey_Biznecc_ - Code - _damikdevv, zahar4ik_ZaharkaSo_ - Authors - _Nub5s, Likon_ - Contributors - _Campfire Tales Skin Pack_ - Ideas And Inspiration
